vocab.meaning: độ bền vô song/không đối thủ
vocab.example: I swear by high-quality leather boots because they offer unrivalled durability even when trekking through harsh conditions.

vocab.meaning: công nghệ giảm chấn/hấp thụ xung lực
vocab.example: I'm quite fond of these trainers as they incorporate advanced shock-absorbing technology, making long-distance running much easier on my joints.
When attending a corporate event, I always opt for classic Oxford shoes that exude professionalism and attention to detail.
I love wearing vibrant sneakers with a monochrome outfit to add a pop of color and express my personality.

vocab.meaning: phục vụ cho/đáp ứng nhu cầu của
vocab.example: My favorite footwear brand specifically caters to people with flat feet, providing specialized arch support.
I prefer shoes with a streamlined silhouette as they look modern and don't feel too bulky when I'm on the move.

vocab.meaning: lớp hoàn thiện chống thấm nước
vocab.example: Living in a rainy city, I find it essential to wear footwear that has a reliable water-resistant finish.

vocab.meaning: các hoạt động cường độ cao/năng nổ
vocab.example: For high-octane activities like cross-training, I need shoes that offer both flexibility and a secure fit.

vocab.meaning: việc đóng (giày) theo yêu cầu riêng
vocab.example: While expensive, footwear made through bespoke tailoring ensures an exact fit that store-bought shoes simply cannot match.
Classic loafers are my go-to because their design has stood the test of time and never goes out of style.
